name: fella-cli
description: File Exploration and Local Logic Automation - An Agentic CLI

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
scripts.caxa:win: npm run build && caxa --input dist --output bin/fella-win.exe -- "{{caxa}}/node_modules/.bin/node" "{{caxa}}/index.js"
scripts.caxa:linux: npm run build && caxa --input dist --output bin/fella-linux -- "{{caxa}}/node_modules/.bin/node" "{{caxa}}/index.js"
scripts.caxa:mac: npm run build && caxa --input dist --output bin/fella-macos -- "{{caxa}}/node_modules/.bin/node" "{{caxa}}/index.js"
scripts.dist: taskkill /F /IM fella-win.exe 2>nul & npm run build && caxa --input dist --output bin/fella-win.exe -- node "{{caxa}}/run.cjs"
